conventions.name: workspace-packages-have-basics
conventions.description: Every workspace package keeps the common manifest, TypeScript config, and public source directory shape.

conventions.name: ts-packages-have-index
conventions.description: Non-React packages expose their public package boundary from src/index.ts.

conventions.name: ui-package-has-tsx-index
conventions.description: The UI package exposes its React boundary from src/index.tsx and keeps its component registry.

conventions.name: package-source-avoids-parent-imports
conventions.description: Package runtime source should depend through local siblings or package boundaries instead of parent-relative imports.

conventions.name: domain-runtime-stays-pure
conventions.description: The domain package stays runtime-pure until a deliberate dependency boundary is chosen.

conventions.name: web-route-registration
conventions.description: Each web route module exports a registration function named after the route file.

conventions.name: vesta-app-service
conventions.description: The Worker runtime service seam keeps its public service, service shape, and runtime type exports.

conventions.name: vesta-app-live-layer
conventions.description: The live Worker layer keeps named composition functions instead of anonymous route setup.

conventions.name: web-app-entry
conventions.description: The Hono composition module keeps createApp as the public app factory.

conventions.name: db-service-anchor
conventions.description: The persistence package keeps its Effect service as the public anchor.

conventions.name: memory-index-service-anchor
conventions.description: The primitive services package keeps MemoryIndex as an explicit Effect service.
